Privacy & Compliance

  • Privacy
Back to top
View this page

Privacy¶

PII patterns and validators for privacy compliance.

PIIPattern¶

from griot_core.privacy import PIIPattern
from griot_core.models.enums import PIIType, ComplianceFramework

pattern = PIIPattern(
    name="Kenya National ID",
    pii_type=PIIType.NATIONAL_ID,
    pattern=r"^\d{8}$",
    description="Kenya 8-digit national ID",
    confidence=0.95,
    validator=kenya_id_check,
    frameworks=[ComplianceFramework.KENYA_DPA],
    region="KE",
)

Built-in Patterns¶

Kenya Patterns:

  • National ID

  • KRA PIN

  • Phone numbers

  • M-PESA transaction codes

EU Patterns:

  • IBAN

  • VAT numbers

  • German Personal ID

Universal Patterns:

  • Email

  • Credit card

  • IPv4 address

  • MAC address

  • SSN

  • Date of birth

  • Passport number

Validators¶

from griot_core.privacy.patterns import (
    luhn_check,
    iban_check,
    kenya_id_check,
    kra_pin_check,
)

# Credit card validation
assert luhn_check("4111111111111111") == True

# IBAN validation
assert iban_check("DE89370400440532013000") == True

API Reference¶

Griot Core Privacy Utilities.

This module provides PII pattern definitions and validation utilities. Patterns are utility data that can be bundled into executors or passed as parameters at runtime.

class griot_core.privacy.PIIPattern(name, pii_type, pattern, description, confidence=0.9, validator=None, frameworks=None, region='universal')[source]¶

Pattern definition for PII detection.

Used to detect and classify personally identifiable information in data columns using regex patterns and optional validators.

Parameters:

  • name (str)

  • pii_type (PIIType)

  • pattern (str)

  • description (str)

  • confidence (float)

  • validator (Callable[[str], bool] | None)

  • frameworks (List[ComplianceFramework] | None)

  • region (str)

name¶

Human-readable name for this pattern (e.g., “Kenya National ID”)

Type:

str

pii_type¶

The type of PII this pattern detects

Type:

griot_core.models.enums.PIIType

pattern¶

Regular expression pattern for detection

Type:

str

description¶

Description of what this pattern matches

Type:

str

confidence¶

Confidence level when pattern matches (0.0 to 1.0)

Type:

float

validator¶

Optional validation function for additional verification

Type:

Callable[[str], bool] | None

frameworks¶

Compliance frameworks this pattern is relevant to

Type:

List[griot_core.models.enums.ComplianceFramework] | None

region¶

Geographic region for this pattern (e.g., “kenya”, “eu”, “universal”)

Type:

str

confidence: float = 0.9¶
frameworks: List[ComplianceFramework] | None = None¶
region: str = 'universal'¶
validator: Callable[[str], bool] | None = None¶
name: str¶
pii_type: PIIType¶
pattern: str¶
description: str¶
